phase: Phase 15 Task 1 — Two-driver (rates+equity) nested/LSMC capital proxy

capital_equity_driver_in_tail.interpretation: Switching on the equity-linked maturity guarantee raises the 99.5% SCR-proxy from the rate-only (Task-6-equivalent) level, confirming the equity driver now contributes to the capital tail — the documented single-risk-driver limitation is closed.

model_use_restrictions.classification: EDUCATIONAL ONLY — NOT a regulatory capital model
model_use_restrictions.risk_drivers: Capital tail is driven by TWO correlated drivers at the horizon: the short rate r_H and the equity level S_H (ESG correlation rho carried through outer and inner). Lapse, credit-spread, mortality-trend, and FX risks are still NOT in the tail.
model_use_restrictions.improvement_over_task6: Closes the documented single-risk-driver limitation of the Phase 14 Task 6 proxy by adding the equity driver and an equity-linked maturity guarantee (GMMB / put) to the conditional liability.
model_use_restrictions.placeholder_parameters: HW1F and GBM parameters are illustrative placeholders; capital magnitudes are NOT calibrated.
model_use_restrictions.lsmc_extrapolation: The bivariate polynomial surface L_hat(r, S) is valid only across the fitted 2-D state region (interquartile box). Extrapolation beyond it is unsupported and may be unstable at high degree.
model_use_restrictions.convergence_requirements: Inner standard error decays ~1/sqrt(n_inner); 99.5% capital requires N_outer >= 2000 (ASOP 56 §3.5). Proxy-vs-nested agreement must be reviewed before any figure is cited.
model_use_restrictions.no_management_actions: No dynamic management actions, bonus reactions, or asset rebalancing are modelled in the inner valuation.
model_use_restrictions.governance: Independent APS X2 review pending; production sign-off withheld. Use only for education, methodology demonstration, and testing.
